title: nepeta rigida
intro: Nepeta rigida, also known as catmint, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Nepeta rigida include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a restful sleep. Nepeta rigida can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions or simply as a calming herbal remedy.
